sentences.arabic: اشْتَعَلَ حَرِيقٌ صَغِيرٌ فِي مَطْبَخِ مَطْعَمٍ بِالْمَدِينَةِ.
sentences.translation: Izbio je mali požar u kuhinji restorana u gradu.
sentences.translationEn: A small fire broke out in the kitchen of a city restaurant.

sentences.arabic: وَصَلَتْ سَيَّارَةُ الْإِطْفَاءِ بِسُرْعَةٍ وَأَخْمَدَتِ النِّيرَانَ.
sentences.translation: Vatrogasno vozilo je brzo stiglo i ugasilo vatru.
sentences.translationEn: The fire truck arrived quickly and extinguished the flames.

sentences.arabic: لَمْ يُصَبْ أَحَدٌ بِأَذًى فِي هَذَا الْحَرِيقِ.
sentences.translation: Niko nije povrijeđen u ovom požaru.
sentences.translationEn: No one was hurt in this fire.

sentences.arabic: أَغْلَقَ الْمَطْعَمُ أَبْوَابَهُ لِيَوْمٍ وَاحِدٍ لِلتَّنْظِيفِ.
sentences.translation: Restoran je zatvorio vrata na jedan dan radi čišćenja.
sentences.translationEn: The restaurant closed its doors for one day for cleaning.
